overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a Medjay character walking through the Temple of Ptah in ancient Memphis. The character proceeds along a grand ceremonial avenue lined with sphinx statues toward massive stone temple pylons, then turns toward a side courtyard containing an obelisk.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial avenue leading to temple pylons

agents.ego_description: Medjay character walking steadily along the stone avenue toward the temple entrance, shield visible on back

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress walking alongside the sphinx statues

entered.detail: massive stone temple towers with hieroglyphic carvings and red banners at top
row of large black sphinx statues lining the ceremonial path
tall palm trees framing the avenue entrance
wide stone-tiled ceremonial walkway with geometric patterns
bronze ceremonial bowls placed between sphinx statues

segments.scene_description: The Medjay character walks along a grand ceremonial avenue toward the towering pylons of the Temple of Ptah. Large sphinx statues line the right side of the path while palm trees sway in the background. The stone pavement stretches ahead under a clear blue sky as scattered pedestrians move through the sacred precinct.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple forecourt at base of pylons

events.description: character begins turning left away from main temple entrance toward side courtyard

agents.ego_description: approaching the temple stairs while passing close to the sphinx statues and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: child running across the avenue toward the temple stairs

entered.detail: grand staircase leading up to the temple entrance between the pylons
smaller stone structures adjacent to the main temple complex

segments.scene_description: The character continues toward the temple, now close enough to see the detailed hieroglyphics on the pylons and the grand entrance stairs. The sphinx statues pass by on the right as the character approaches the base of the temple. At the end of the segment, the character begins to turn left away from the main entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: side courtyard with obelisk and additional sphinx statues

events.description: character turns left toward the side courtyard featuring the obelisk
view shifts from temple pylons to ceremonial obelisk and side structures

agents.ego_description: turning left away from the main temple entrance and walking toward the obelisk in the side courtyard

entered.detail: tall stone obelisk with hieroglyphic inscriptions standing in the side courtyard
additional sphinx statues arranged near the obelisk
stone wall marking the boundary of the temple complex

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a side courtyard, revealing a tall ceremonial obelisk and additional sphinx statues. The main temple pylons recede from view as the camera focuses on the ancient monument. The stone pavement continues through this secondary sacred area, bordered by perimeter walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a grand ceremonial avenue that transitions from a wide approach toward the Temple of Ptah into a focused view of a secluded side courtyard. It begins with the Medjay walking past a line of sphinx statues and swaying palm trees under a clear blue sky, moving steadily toward towering temple pylons. As the character draws closer, the scale of the architecture shifts to reveal detailed hieroglyphics and grand entrance stairs before the camera begins to pivot away from the main gateway. The scene then opens into a side courtyard, where the massive pylons recede from view to make room for a tall ceremonial obelisk and additional sphinx statues. Finally, the movement settles within this secondary sacred area, bordered by perimeter walls and paved in ancient stone.
